## Summary

Describe the problem and the solution in a few sentences.

## Scope

- List the files or components intentionally changed.
- Call out anything deliberately left for follow-up.
- Confirm that unrelated refactors, formatting churn, and generated output are excluded.

## Verification

- [ ] `node --test tests/system/open-source-surfaces.test.mjs`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck:api`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck:web`
- [ ] `npm run build:api`
- [ ] `npm run build:web`
- [ ] Additional focused tests are described below, or are not applicable.

Add command results, screenshots, or other evidence that helps reviewers verify
the change. Redact credentials, tokens, private configuration, and other secrets.

## Related Issues

Link any related Issue or explain why none exists.
